final:
module johnson_counter_4bit(
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    output reg [3:0] q
);

always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin
        q <= 4'b0000;
    end else begin
        q <= {~q[0], q[3:1]};
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
